title: strychnos boonei
intro: Strychnos boonei is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as a poisonous tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos boonei include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
